document_meta.title: 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series Technical Data Sheet

sections.source_text: 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series offers very good adhesion performance and high flexibility. These tapes are specifically designed for the attachment of automotive exterior and interior trim applications.
sections.title: General Description
sections.summary: Series-level acrylic foam tape for automotive exterior and interior trim attachment, emphasizing adhesion performance and flexibility.

sections.source_text: Provides final adhesion and holding power to automotive paints and substrates. Meets a number of OEM specifications. Follows the shrinkage and elongation of the plastic part caused by temperature change and has good stress relaxation properties. Stress relaxation characteristics of the viscoelastic core allow the tape to conform well to complex geometries and deliver excellent wet out. Demonstrates excellent adhesive performance at various temperature conditions. Excels in a variety of weather conditions and offers solvent and high temperature resistance.
sections.title: Key Features
sections.summary: Series-level feature bullets covering adhesion, OEM-spec relevance, stress relaxation, conformability, temperature performance, weatherability, solvent resistance, and high-temperature resistance.

sections.source_text: Polyethylene Red liner / Acrylic Pressure Sensitive Adhesive / Acrylic Foam / Acrylic Pressure Sensitive Adhesive
sections.title: Product Construction
sections.summary: Five-layer construction with red polyethylene liner, acrylic PSA on both sides, and acrylic foam core.

sections.source_text: Product Core Core Color Thickness * Liner Adhesive ... GT7102 Acrylic Foam Core Gray 0.2 mm Translucent, red, polyethylene liner Acrylic pressure sensitive ... GT7140 4.0 mm ... *Liner thickness is not included
sections.title: Physical Properties
sections.summary: Item matrix listing GT7102-GT7140, thicknesses, core color groups, liner, and adhesive.

sections.source_text: Tabbing An extended liner tab is recommended. Tabbing Method and Liner Types ... Heat-Bond Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners ... PSA Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners ... Consult application guidelines for detailed product use instructions.
sections.title: Tabbing Method and Liner Types
sections.summary: Processing-related tabbing guidance and regional tape recommendations.

sections.source_text: Typical performance of 3M Acrylic Foam Tape Series GT7100 is shown below. Peel and shear values depend on substrate characteristics and/or paint composition. These values are for reference only, and not to be used for specification purposes. For specification values please see the certificate of analysis.
sections.title: Performance Properties Notes
sections.summary: Performance data are typical/reference values, substrate-dependent, and not guaranteed specification limits.

sections.source_text: Immediate State = 23°C, 20 minutes; Normal State = 23°C, 24 hours; High Temperature = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C; Heat-aging = 23°C, 24 hours -> 80°C, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours; Warm Water Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> 40°C water, 336 hours -> 23°C, 24 hours; Gasoline Immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Gasoline, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours; Wax-remover immersion = 23°C, 24 hours -> Wax-remover, 1 hour -> 23°C, 24 hours
sections.title: Conditions/Test Parameter Definitions
sections.summary: Condition dictionary for peel and shear performance tables.

sections.source_text: Three years from date of manufacture when stored at recommended storage condition 23°C +/- 2°C and 50% +/- 4% relative humidity. 3M Acrylic Foam Tape GT7100 Series should be stored in typical storage conditions for pressure-sensitive adhesives used within the automotive industry...
sections.title: Shelf Life
sections.summary: Shelf life and storage condition guidance at series level.

candidate_content.source_text: 3M Tape GT7100 Series offers the following key features: ...
candidate_content.mapping_reason: Feature bullets are non-numeric selling/functional points and belong in series.product_features.
value: Provides final adhesion and holding power to automotive paints and substrates.
Meets a number of OEM specifications.
Follows shrinkage and elongation of plastic parts caused by temperature changes and has good stress relaxation properties.
Viscoelastic core stress relaxation allows conformity to complex geometries and excellent wet out.
Demonstrates excellent adhesive performance at various temperature conditions.
Excels in weather conditions and offers solvent and high-temperature resistance.

candidate_content.source_text: These tapes are specifically designed for the attachment of automotive exterior and interior trim applications.
candidate_content.mapping_reason: Application statement is explicit and belongs in series.main_applications.
value: Attachment of automotive exterior trim applications.
Attachment of automotive interior trim applications.

candidate_content.source_text: Tabbing An extended liner tab is recommended...
candidate_content.mapping_reason: Tabbing/liner-use guidance is process-related content, not item master fields.
value: An extended liner tab is recommended.
Heat-Bond Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners: 3M Tabbing Tape 5081 or 5082 (EMEA, Americas).
Heat-Bond Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners: 3M Tabbing Tape AM012 (Asia).
PSA Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners: 3M Tabbing Tape 5300 (Global).
PSA Tabbing for Non-Silicone Coated Liners: 3M Tabbing Tape AM926J, AM926JN or 4240, 4240N (Asia).
Consult application guidelines for detailed product use instructions.

candidate_content.value: Typical performance values are for reference only, depend on substrate characteristics and/or paint composition, and should not be used for specification purposes; certificate of analysis should be used for specification values.

candidate_content.source_text: Three years from date of manufacture when stored at recommended storage condition...
candidate_content.mapping_reason: Storage and shelf-life narrative fits storage_note.
candidate_content.value: Shelf life is three years from date of manufacture when stored at 23°C +/- 2°C and 50% +/- 4% RH. Short uncontrolled transportation periods of a few days or weeks should not impact product performance, but extended storage beyond recommended conditions should be avoided.

methods.source_text: 180° Peel Adhesion to Painted Panel Tape Size: 25 mm width; Tape backing: 25 um PET film; Rolling Pressure: 5 kg roller one-way; Peel Speed: 50 mm/min.
Shear Strength Tape Size: 25 mm x 25 mm; Rolling Pressure: 5 kg roller one-way; Tensile Speed: 50 mm/min. Test measures liner side adhesion to painted panel and non-liner side adhesion to PVC panel.

method_details.adhesion_setup: liner side adhesion to painted panel and non-liner side adhesion to PVC panel

unresolved.reason: User requested top-level keys document_meta/sections/tables/candidate_items/candidate_facts/candidate_content/methods/unresolved, while embedded task instructions mention six Odoo import buckets. Returned document-understanding schema per direct instruction.

Physical Properties layout groups Gray and White core colors across subsets of item codes rather than repeating per row; assignments to individual items beyond explicitly shown group boundaries are inferred from layout.
unresolved.source_text: Acrylic Foam Core Gray ... GT7102 ... GT7125 / GT7130 Acrylic Foam Core White 3.0 mm ...

unresolved.reason: Document says 'Translucent, red, polyethylene liner', but available dictionary snapshot only shows liner_option_pet and liner_option_sc2. Polyethylene liner should not be forced into PET or SC2 without confirmation.

Available dictionary key foil_peel_strength means peel strength, but source metric is 180° peel adhesion to painted/PVC panel in N/cm. It may be reusable only if substrate-conditioned peel values are allowed under that key; otherwise new spec definitions may be needed.
unresolved.source_text: 180° Peel Adhesion to Painted Panel ... Typical Performance Value (N/cm)

unresolved.reason: Available key static_shear_70c expects hour-based static shear at 70C, while source provides shear strength in MPa under several states. Do not map directly without new/confirmed parameter key.

Performance matrices contain many item-condition cells; this JSON includes representative facts plus range summaries rather than every single cell. For final Odoo spec import, a full normalized table extraction should be generated.
Document provides series and item codes but no separate commercial item names beyond code/series identity.

Color assignments were taken from 'Core Color' field in the physical properties table, not from chart legend colors. No issue found, but the table layout is dense and should be reviewed during import.
